properties.name: icon
properties.description: A decorative icon the Empty State should have. See the [Vivid Icon Gallery](/icons/icons-gallery/) for available icons and `icon-name`s

properties.name: headline
properties.description: An optional headline for the empty state.

properties.name: connotation
properties.description: The connotation the button should have.

properties.name: icon-decoration
properties.description: Has no effect on the component

slots.name: default
slots.description: The default slot controls the body text of the empty state

slots.name: graphic
slots.description: The graphic slot allows overriding the icon with a custom illustration

slots.name: action-items
slots.description: Slot to add action items to the empty state
